data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## TDD Requirement
Add test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id (Test 11) to tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh.

**Given**: A tracker directory containing ONLY a SNAPSHOT event file (0001-SNAPSHOT.json) for ticket ID `snap-1234` — no CREATE event file present.
**When**: The gate runs with commit message "fix: snap-1234 add feature" and TICKET_TRACKER_OVERRIDE pointing to this tracker.
**Then**: Gate exits 0 (SNAPSHOT ticket is valid).

This test FAILS (RED) before Task B because the current implementation only checks for *-CREATE.json files.

## Implementation

### Sub-step 1: Add make_fake_snapshot_tracker() helper
Insert after the existing `make_fake_tracker()` function:
```bash
# ── Helper: create a fake tracker with a SNAPSHOT (compacted) ticket ───────────
# Usage: make_fake_snapshot_tracker <ticket_id>
# Creates a tracker directory with a SNAPSHOT event file — no CREATE event.
# Used to verify that compacted (post-reducer) tickets pass the gate.
make_fake_snapshot_tracker() {
    local ticket_id="$1"
    local tmpdir
    tmpdir=$(mktemp -d)
    _TEST_TMPDIRS+=("$tmpdir")
    mkdir -p "$tmpdir/$ticket_id"
    printf '{"type":"SNAPSHOT","id":"%s","timestamp":"2026-04-24T00:00:00Z"}\n' \
        "$ticket_id" > "$tmpdir/$ticket_id/0001-SNAPSHOT.json"
    echo "$tmpdir"
}
```

### Sub-step 2: Add Test 11
Add after the last test (Test 10) and before the results section:
```bash
# ── TEST 11: test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id ────────────────────────────────────
echo "Test 11: test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id — gate exits 0 for SNAPSHOT (compacted) ticket"
test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id() {
    local repo_dir tracker_dir commit_msg_file conf_file
    repo_dir=$(make_test_repo)
    stage_source_file "$repo_dir"
    tracker_dir=$(make_fake_snapshot_tracker "snap-1234")
    commit_msg_file=$(make_commit_msg_file "fix: snap-1234 add feature")
    conf_file=$(make_empty_allowlist_conf)
    local result
    result=$(run_gate_hook "$repo_dir" "$commit_msg_file" "$tracker_dir" "$conf_file")
    [ "$result" -eq 0 ]
}
if test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id; then
    echo "  PASS: gate accepts SNAPSHOT (compacted) ticket"
    (( PASS++ ))
else
    echo "  FAIL: gate blocked commit referencing SNAPSHOT-only ticket — compacted tickets must pass" >&2
    (( FAIL++ ))
fi
```

### Sub-step 3: Update test count comment
Change `# Test cases (10):` to `# Test cases (11):` at top of file.
Add to the test list:
`#  11. test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id       — tracker with SNAPSHOT (no CREATE) event exits 0`

### Sub-step 4: Update .test-index with RED marker
Append to .test-index:
`plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh: tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh [test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id]`

Note: fuzzy match check: normalized source = "precommitticketgatesh", normalized test = "testprecommitticketgatesh" — "precommitticketgatesh" IS a substring. Fuzzy match catches this pair without needing .test-index, but the RED marker format still requires .test-index for pre-commit test gate compliance.

## Files to Modify
- tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh (add helper + Test 11)
- .test-index (add RED marker entry)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh shows test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id as FAIL (RED confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL\|fail'
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for this test
  Verify: grep -q '\[test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id\]' "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index"
- [ ] Test 11 exists in the test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_allows_snapshot_ticket_id' tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
- [ ] make_fake_snapshot_tracker helper exists
  Verify: grep -q 'make_fake_snapshot_tracker' tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
- [ ] Existing 10 tests still pass (no regression from adding helper/test)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh 2>&1 | grep -q '10 passed'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
data.title: Write RED test for SNAPSHOT ticket acceptance in pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh
